The '''Zabrak blaster carbine''' was a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] available in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3956 BBY]]. but one that suffered from the inability to be upgraded due to the complexity involved in its construction. Fortunately, its sheer power made the need of an upgrade unnecessary.

{{Weapon-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
